response.justification: Strong generalist software craftsman with 10+ years of polyglot full-stack experience and recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG/vector databases, cloud-native AI architectures, and customer-facing technical leadership at the staff level expected for this Forward Deployed role. AI experience appears recent (~1 year) rather than the 8+ years of shipping production AI solutions required.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js background plus current hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflows
Proven software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and teaching/workshop experience signaling mentorship ability
Polyglot full-stack breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and data-integration microservices at scale
concerns: No demonstrated 8+ years of production AI/ML delivery; GenAI exposure looks limited to recent re:cinq work
Missing explicit experience with RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, and multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
No clear cloud-AI architecture experience on AWS/GCP/Azure or customer-facing discovery/consulting track record at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: Gaps in RAG/vector DB and multi-agent frameworks
